name: Shorshe Ilish
description: Classic Bengali hilsa fish cooked in a rich mustard sauce. Served with steamed white rice. A true taste of Bengal.

name: Chingri Malai Curry
description: Juicy prawns slow-cooked in a creamy coconut milk gravy. A festive Bengali favourite.

name: Beef Bhuna
description: Slow-cooked beef with whole spices, caramelised onions and a thick dry gravy. Best with paratha.

name: Vegetable Khichuri
description: Comforting one-pot rice and lentil dish with seasonal vegetables. Perfect for rainy days.

name: Kacchi Biryani
description: Authentic dum biryani with marinated mutton layered with fragrant basmati rice, saffron and fried onions.

name: Mutton Rezala
description: Silky white gravy with tender mutton, yoghurt, rose water and Mughlai spices. A royal dish.

name: Chicken Tikka BBQ
description: Smoky tandoor-style chicken tikka marinated overnight in yoghurt and spices. Served with mint chutney.

name: Beef Kala Bhuna
description: Chittagong-style deep dark beef curry with a thick, rich masala. Slow cooked for 3 hours.

name: Dal Makhani
description: Creamy black lentils slow-cooked overnight with butter, cream and tomatoes. A north Indian classic.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Soft cottage cheese cubes in a velvety tomato-butter gravy with aromatic spices. Best with naan.

name: Aloo Paratha Combo
description: 3 stuffed flatbreads with spiced potato filling. Served with homemade yoghurt and mango pickle.

name: Old Dhaka Haleem
description: Traditional slow-cooked haleem with beef, lentils and broken wheat. Topped with fried onions and lemon.

name: Fuchka Platter (10 pcs)
description: Crispy hollow puris filled with spiced tamarind water, chickpeas and potato. The ultimate street snack.

name: Kung Pao Chicken
description: Spicy stir-fried chicken with roasted peanuts, dried chilies and Sichuan peppercorns. Fiery, numbing, and absolutely addictive.

name: Dim Sum Platter (12 pcs)
description: Assorted steamed dumplings — har gow, siu mai and pork chive — served in bamboo steamers with soy dipping sauce.

name: Beef Fried Rice
description: Wok-tossed jasmine rice with tender beef strips, egg, spring onions and dark soy. Classic Chinese takeaway done properly at home.

name: Pad Thai
description: Rice noodles stir-fried with shrimp, tofu, bean sprouts, egg and crushed peanuts in a tangy tamarind sauce. Garnished with lime.

name: Green Curry with Chicken
description: Fragrant Thai green curry with coconut milk, chicken, Thai basil, kaffir lime and galangal. Served with steamed jasmine rice.

name: Tom Yum Soup
description: Hot and sour Thai soup with mushrooms, lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime leaves and plump prawns. A clear bowl of pure comfort.

name: Margherita Pizza
description: 48-hour fermented sourdough base with San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh buffalo mozzarella and basil. Simple and perfect.

name: Pepperoni Pizza
description: Loaded with double pepperoni on a tomato base with mozzarella. Edges crisp, centre gooey — cooked in a pizza stone oven.

name: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: Handmade spaghetti with guanciale, egg yolk, Pecorino Romano and cracked black pepper. No cream — just the real Roman way.

name: Penne Arrabbiata
description: Penne in a fiery tomato and garlic sauce with fresh chili and Italian parsley. Bold, simple, vegan-friendly Italian perfection.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tender tandoor-charred chicken in a velvety tomato and cream gravy. Rich, mildly spiced and deeply satisfying with naan.

name: Masala Dosa
description: Crispy golden crepe made from fermented rice and lentil batter, filled with spiced potato. Served with coconut chutney and sambar.

name: Lamb Rogan Josh
description: Slow-cooked Kashmiri lamb in a deep aromatic gravy of whole spices, dried chilies and browned onions. A royal mountain dish.

name: Smoked BBQ Ribs
description: Pork ribs slow-smoked with hickory for 5 hours, glazed with house BBQ sauce. Fall-off-the-bone tender with a charred bark crust.

name: Double Smash Burger
description: Two smashed beef patties with American cheese, caramelised onions, pickles, mustard and special sauce in a brioche bun.

name: BBQ Chicken Wings (10 pcs)
description: Charcoal-grilled wings glazed in smoky honey-chipotle BBQ sauce. Crispy outside, juicy inside, with blue cheese dip on the side.

name: Tonkotsu Ramen
description: 12-hour pork bone broth with wavy noodles, chashu pork belly, soft-boiled marinated egg, nori and bamboo shoots. Soul in a bowl.

name: Spicy Tuna Sushi Roll (8 pcs)
description: Hand-rolled sushi with fresh tuna, sriracha mayo, cucumber and avocado, wrapped in nori and seasoned rice. Topped with tobiko.

name: Chicken Katsu Curry
description: Panko-crumbed chicken cutlet on steamed Japanese rice, drizzled with rich golden curry sauce and pickled radish on the side.

name: Chicken Shawarma Wrap
description: Marinated chicken slow-roasted on a vertical spit, shaved and wrapped in warm flatbread with garlic sauce, pickles and fresh tomatoes.

name: Falafel & Hummus Platter
description: Crispy golden falafel balls with creamy homemade hummus, tabbouleh, warm pita bread and a drizzle of olive oil and za'atar.

name: Mixed Mezze Board
description: A generous spread of hummus, baba ghanoush, muhammara, labneh, olives, stuffed vine leaves, warm flatbread and crudités.

name: Classic Tiramisu
description: Ladyfinger biscuits soaked in espresso and Kahlua, layered with mascarpone cream and dusted with dark cocoa. Chilled 12 hours.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm dark chocolate cake with a molten fudge centre, served with vanilla bean ice cream and raspberry coulis. Must eat immediately!

name: Dessert Box (5 items)
description: Curated box of 5 rotating mini desserts — brownies, macarons, cheesecake bites, cookies and a seasonal surprise. Perfect for gifting.

name: Tteokbokki
description: Chewy rice cakes simmered in spicy gochujang sauce with fish cakes and spring onions. Korea's most beloved street snack.

name: Korean Fried Chicken (8 pcs)
description: Double-fried chicken with a shattering crispy coating, tossed in either sweet soy garlic or nuclear buldak sauce. Served with pickled daikon.

name: Bibimbap
description: Warm rice bowl topped with seasoned vegetables, minced beef, a fried egg and gochujang paste. Mix it all up and enjoy the harmony.

name: Loaded Burrito
description: Flour tortilla stuffed with seasoned rice, black beans, slow-cooked pulled chicken, pico de gallo, guacamole, sour cream and cheddar.

name: Street Tacos (3 pcs)
description: Soft corn tortillas with al pastor pork, diced white onion, fresh cilantro, a squeeze of lime and smoky chipotle salsa.

name: Nachos Supreme
description: Tortilla chips layered with pulled beef chili, melted jalapeño cheese sauce, pickled jalapeños, pico de gallo, guacamole and sour cream.

name: Kacchi Biryani (Full Pot)
description: Traditional dum biryani with whole leg of mutton layered in saffron basmati — slow-cooked on coal for 6 hours. Serves 2.

name: Chicken Roast
description: Whole chicken legs marinated in yoghurt, spices and ghee, then oven-roasted to a golden finish. Old Dhaka style.

name: Mutton Tehari
description: One-pot mutton and rice cooked together in aromatic spices. Simpler than biryani, deeper in flavour.

name: Grilled Chicken Power Bowl
description: Herb-marinated grilled chicken breast on a bed of quinoa, roasted sweet potato, avocado, cherry tomatoes and tahini dressing.

name: Smoked Salmon Salad
description: Mixed greens with Norwegian smoked salmon, cucumber ribbons, capers, red onion and a lemon-dill vinaigrette. Light and elegant.

name: Acai Smoothie Bowl
description: Frozen acai, banana and mixed berries blended thick, topped with granola, fresh mango, chia seeds and honey drizzle.

name: Cantonese Roast Duck
description: Hong Kong-style roast duck with crispy lacquered skin and tender, juicy meat. Served with plum sauce and steamed rice.

name: Char Siu Pork Bao (6 pcs)
description: Fluffy steamed buns filled with sticky-sweet Cantonese BBQ pork. Hand-made wrappers, char siu cooked fresh every morning.

name: Wonton Noodle Soup
description: Silky pork and shrimp wontons in a clear ginger-scallion broth with thin egg noodles. Clean, comforting and deeply satisfying.

name: Seekh Kebab Platter (8 pcs)
description: Minced lamb seekh kebabs grilled on charcoal skewers, served with mint raita, chutney and fresh salad. Fall-off-the-skewer tender.

name: Shish Tawook
description: Lebanese-style marinated chicken cubes on skewers, grilled to perfection. Served with garlic toum, pickles and warm pita.

name: Mixed Grill Platter
description: A feast — 2 seekh kebabs, 2 chicken tikka, 2 shish tawook skewers and 2 lamb chops on one platter with sides. Serves 2.

name: Massaman Curry with Beef
description: Rich, mild Thai curry with slow-braised beef, potatoes, peanuts and coconut milk. Influenced by Persian and Indian spices.

name: Vietnamese Pho Bo
description: 12-hour star anise and charred ginger beef bone broth with rice noodles, paper-thin beef slices, bean sprouts and fresh herbs.

name: Som Tum (Green Papaya Salad)
description: Pounded green papaya with dried shrimp, cherry tomatoes, palm sugar, fish sauce and fresh chilies. Zingy, crunchy and addictive.

name: Lasagne al Forno
description: Hand-layered lasagne with slow-cooked beef ragù, béchamel and Parmesan. Baked in a cast iron dish. Serves 2 generously.

name: Potato Gnocchi with Gorgonzola
description: Pillowy handmade potato gnocchi tossed in a creamy Gorgonzola and walnut sauce. Rich, indulgent and totally authentic.

name: Cannoli Box (4 pcs)
description: Crispy shell cannoli filled with sweetened ricotta, chocolate chips and candied peel. Made fresh daily — order by noon.

name: Jollof Rice with Suya Chicken
description: West African party jollof rice cooked in a smoky tomato base, served with suya-spiced grilled chicken and fried plantain.

name: Peri-Peri Chicken Wrap
description: Flame-grilled peri-peri marinated chicken in a toasted flour wrap with coleslaw, avocado and house chili sauce. Inspired by Nando's — but better.

name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
description: Smoky BBQ base with pulled chicken, red onion, mozzarella and fresh coriander on a sourdough crust.

name: Four Cheese Pizza
description: A pizza lover's dream — mozzarella, gorgonzola, provolone and Parmesan on a thin crispy base with fresh basil and honey.

name: Loaded Hot Dog
description: All-beef frank in a brioche bun loaded with caramelised onions, cheese sauce, jalapeños, crispy shallots and mustard.

name: Chili Cheese Fries
description: Crispy thick-cut fries smothered in slow-cooked beef chili, jalapeño cheese sauce, sour cream and spring onions. A proper bar classic.

name: Budae Jjigae (Army Stew)
description: Korea's legendary hot pot — kimchi, spam, sausage, ramen noodles, tofu and gochujang in a rich spicy broth. Great for sharing.

name: Chicken Teriyaki Bento Box
description: Glazed teriyaki chicken with steamed rice, pickled vegetables, tamagoyaki egg roll, edamame and miso soup. A complete Japanese meal.

name: Lamb Kofta with Bulgur
description: Spiced ground lamb kofta patties on a bed of herby bulgur wheat with roasted tomatoes, pomegranate molasses and tzatziki.

name: New York Cheesecake Slice
description: Thick, dense and impossibly creamy New York-style cheesecake on a buttery graham cracker crust. Served with berry compote.

name: Crème Brûlée (2 pcs)
description: Classic French vanilla custard with a perfectly caramelised sugar crust cracked tableside. Smooth, rich and elegant.
